julesThoughtProcess: I chose a vibrant Electric Yellow (#E5FF00) because its high-energy, striking saturation perfectly fits the neon-drenched cyberpunk aesthetic, while contrasting brilliantly with the deep blacks of the mosaic. I placed this block at coordinates (5, 10) in the grid so that it aligns seamlessly with our 20x20 cell layout and contributes to the sprawling digital tapestry.
storyPanel: Known as 'Volt', this cyber-runner channels unfiltered electric currents directly into their neural implants. They sprint through the corporate mainframes, leaving behind a trail of blazing yellow data fragments.
